---
title: "HindiBabyNet Preregistered Statistical Report"
format:
  pdf: default
  html: default
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Report Status

This Quarto source is part of the Phase 1 scaffold. Later phases will populate
it with dataset summaries, model-selection rationale, diagnostics, Monte Carlo
confidence intervals, publication-quality figures, and evidence-based
hypothesis evaluation.
